query:
-- 查询所有老师角色的用户及其城市数据
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
  u.nickname,
  u.phone,
  u.roles,
  urc.cities
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN user_role_cities urc ON u.id = urc.userId AND urc.role = '老师'
WHERE u.roles LIKE '%老师%'
  AND u.deletedAt IS NULL
ORDER BY u.id;

  u.phone,
  u.roles,
  urc.cities
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN user_role_cities urc ON u.id = urc.userId AND urc.role = '老师'
